column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a grand temple gate" | TEXT="着きました" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Putting hands together in prayer" | TEXT="お参りしましょう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Tossing a coin into the offering box" | TEXT="お賽銭" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing twice respectfully" | TEXT="二礼二拍手一礼" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking earnestly at a drawn omikuji (fortune)" | TEXT="大吉！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking disappointed at fortune" | TEXT="凶だった…" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Tying the fortune to a designated string" | TEXT="結びます" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Holding an ema (wooden plaque) smiling" | TEXT="願い事" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Walking on stone steps gracefully" | TEXT="風情があります"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking tired, wiping forehead" | TEXT="少し疲れました" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting on a red bench at a teahouse" | TEXT="休憩しましょう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Eating matcha ice cream" | TEXT="冷たくて美味しい" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking refreshed and happy" | TEXT="元気出た" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a beautiful dry landscape garden" | TEXT="枯山水ですね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing with deep relaxation" | TEXT="心静まる" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Pondering deeply, looking at the moss" | TEXT="侘び寂び" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding knowingly" | TEXT="なるほど" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a fine picture with camera" | TEXT="良い構図"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Waving to a friend" | TEXT="おーい" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Rushing excitedly" | TEXT="急ごう！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking puzzled, holding a map" | TEXT="迷子かも" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Tilting head cutely" | TEXT="どこかな？" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking relieved when found" | TEXT="あった！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="完璧です" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Doing a tiny victory pose" | TEXT="やったね" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking proud hands on hips" | TEXT="任せて" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing politely to a monk" | TEXT="有難うございます"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Slipping on a stone, looking shocked" | TEXT="わっ！" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Being caught playfully" | TEXT="危なかった" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing playfully, hiding mouth" | TEXT="おほほ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting lightly" | TEXT="笑わないで" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a beautiful weeping cherry tree" | TEXT="しだれ桜" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands gently" | TEXT="見事ですね" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling purely at someone" | TEXT="一緒に来れてよかった" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Blushing looking down" | TEXT="照れるな" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up happily" | TEXT="最高の旅"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sad, tearing up" | TEXT="感動です" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping tears with handkerchief" | TEXT="ぐすっ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an OK sign gently" | TEXT="大丈夫" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a hand" | TEXT="行きましょう" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Purchasing an omamori (amulet)" | TEXT="お守り買いました" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Giving the omamori to someone" | TEXT="どうぞ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Clasping hands in a wish" | TEXT="ご利益ありますように" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at sunset affectionately" | TEXT="夕暮れですね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching elegantly" | TEXT="あー疲れた"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye at the temple gate" | TEXT="また来ます" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sleepy on the train back" | TEXT="うとうと" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping happily" | TEXT="すやすや" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Waking up refreshed" | TEXT="おはよう！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at souvenir bag" | TEXT="お土産だよ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Offering the souvenir" | TEXT="つまらないものですが" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling softly and warmly" | TEXT="お疲れ様でした" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply" | TEXT="お世話になりました" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving cheerfully" | TEXT="ばいばい"
